name: Muslin Swaddle Blanket - Floral - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your baby warm and comfy with this Floral Muslin Swaddle Blanket from Cloud Island™. This swaddle blanket is made from 100% cotton and muslin weave for a soft, breathable feel against their delicate skin during naps, stroller outings and more. It features a charming floral print with tiny flowers and leaves on an off-white background to add sweet style to your little one's essentials.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
